## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots added for UI changes
